languages.text: Иссохшая кожа, обтягивающая скулы, делает выражение ужаса, застывшее на лице мертвеца, еще более гротескным. В груди трупа зияет идеально круглая дыра. Ни одно оружие из известных вам не оставляет подобных ран.

The dried skin stretched taut across the cheekbones amplifies the grotesque look of terror frozen on the corpse's face. A perfectly round hole gapes in its chest. No weapon you know of leaves wounds like this.
languages.original_text: Иссохшая кожа, обтягивающая скулы, делает выражение ужаса, застывшее на лице мертвеца, еще более гротескным. В груди трупа зияет идеально круглая дыра. Ни одно оружие из известных вам не оставляет подобных ран.

traits.locale_text: The dried skin stretched tight across the cheekbones amplifies the grotesque look of terror frozen on the corpse's face. A perfectly round hole gapes in its chest. No weapon you know leaves wounds like this.

The dried skin stretched taut across the cheekbones amplifies the grotesque look of terror frozen on the corpse's face. A perfectly round hole gapes in its chest. No weapon you know of leaves wounds like this.

The dried skin stretched taut across the cheekbones amplifies the grotesque look of terror frozen on the corpse's face. A perfectly round hole gapes in its chest. No weapon you know of leaves wounds like this.

languages.text: Die über die Wangenknochen gespannte trockene Haut verstärkt das groteske Entsetzen im Gesicht des Leichnams. In seiner Brust klafft ein kreisrundes Loch. Dir ist keine Waffe bekannt, die derartige Wunden verursacht.
languages.original_text: The dried skin stretched taut across the cheekbones amplifies the grotesque look of terror frozen on the corpse's face. A perfectly round hole gapes in its chest. No weapon you know of leaves wounds like this.

traits.locale_text: Die über die Wangenknochen gespannte trockene Haut verstärkt das groteske Entsetzen im Gesicht des Leichnams. In seiner Brust klafft ein kreisrundes Loch. Dir ist keine Waffe bekannt, die derartige Wunden verursacht.

languages.text: La peau séchée, tendue sur les pommettes, amplifie l'aspect grotesque du regard terrifié qu'affiche le cadavre gelé. Une blessure parfaitement circulaire orne sa poitrine. Vous n'avez jamais croisé d'arme capable d'infliger une telle blessure.
languages.original_text: The dried skin stretched taut across the cheekbones amplifies the grotesque look of terror frozen on the corpse's face. A perfectly round hole gapes in its chest. No weapon you know of leaves wounds like this.

traits.locale_text: La peau séchée, tendue sur les pommettes, amplifie l'aspect grotesque du regard terrifié qu'affiche le cadavre gelé. Une blessure parfaitement circulaire orne sa poitrine. Vous n'avez jamais croisé d'arme capable d'infliger une telle blessure.

languages.text: La piel seca estirada sobre los pómulos amplifica la grotesca mirada de terror congelada en el rostro del cadáver. Un agujero perfectamente redondo atraviesa su pecho. Ningún arma que conozcas deja heridas como esa.
languages.original_text: The dried skin stretched taut across the cheekbones amplifies the grotesque look of terror frozen on the corpse's face. A perfectly round hole gapes in its chest. No weapon you know of leaves wounds like this.

traits.locale_text: La piel seca estirada sobre los pómulos amplifica la grotesca mirada de terror congelada en el rostro del cadáver. Un agujero perfectamente redondo atraviesa su pecho. Ningún arma que conozcas deja heridas como esa.

languages.text: Elmacık kemiklerini sımsıkı kaplayan kurumuş deri, cesedin yüzünde donup kalmış korkunun o grotesk görünümünü daha da artırıyor. Göğsünde kusursuz yuvarlaklıkta bir delik var. Böylesi bir yara bırakan bir silah bilmiyorsun.
languages.original_text: The dried skin stretched taut across the cheekbones amplifies the grotesque look of terror frozen on the corpse's face. A perfectly round hole gapes in its chest. No weapon you know of leaves wounds like this.

traits.locale_text: Elmacık kemiklerini sımsıkı kaplayan kurumuş deri, cesedin yüzünde donup kalmış korkunun o grotesk görünümünü daha da artırıyor. Göğsünde kusursuz yuvarlaklıkta bir delik var. Böylesi bir yara bırakan bir silah bilmiyorsun.

languages.text: 干裂的皮肤紧绷在颧骨上，使尸体脸上凝固的恐惧显得更加扭曲可怖。其胸口洞开着一个浑圆的孔洞。你所知的任何武器都无法造成这样的伤口。
languages.original_text: The dried skin stretched taut across the cheekbones amplifies the grotesque look of terror frozen on the corpse's face. A perfectly round hole gapes in its chest. No weapon you know of leaves wounds like this.

traits.locale_text: 干裂的皮肤紧绷在颧骨上，使尸体脸上凝固的恐惧显得更加扭曲可怖。其胸口洞开着一个浑圆的孔洞。你所知的任何武器都无法造成这样的伤口。

languages.text: 死者の顔は恐怖の表情を浮かべているが、顔の皮膚は乾いて張り、その表情をさらに不気味なものにしている。胸には円形の穴が開いている。この様な傷は、知っている武器では残らない。
languages.original_text: The dried skin stretched taut across the cheekbones amplifies the grotesque look of terror frozen on the corpse's face. A perfectly round hole gapes in its chest. No weapon you know of leaves wounds like this.
